title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Embassy Office Parks REIT

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Embassy Office Parks REIT
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Embassy Office Parks REIT in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Embassy Office Parks REIT:
Embassy Office Parks REIT is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Office Parks REIT!
